evals.name: project-config-setup

evals.name: model-and-permission-tuning
evals.prompt: Tighten permissions for a repo and pin the default model without changing unrelated config layers.

evals.prompt: This is a planning-only response.Add an MCP server with the smallest config surface and call out any auth step.

evals.prompt: This is a planning-only response.Configure project agents or modes for a tmux-heavy workflow without broad resets.

evals.name: project-vs-global-scope
evals.prompt: This is a planning-only response.Decide whether a model pin and permission rule should live in project config or user defaults for one repo only.
